company.name: Merck & Co. Inc.
company.subtitle: Keytruda $31.7B 2025 (48% revenue) | 2028 LOE cliff | Subq Keytruda Qlex bridge | Winrevair PAH ramping | Tulisokibart UC/CD Ph3
company.cashRunway: Self-funding ($20B+ annual op cash flow; $35B LT debt post-Verona/Prometheus M&A)

assets.name: Keytruda + Qlex (pembrolizumab IV + subq)
assets.stage: Commercial ($31.7B 2025; subq Qlex approved Sep-2025; LOE 2028)

market.notes: Largest Keytruda indication ~40% of brand. KEYNOTE-189/407/671 1L mono+chemo; KEYNOTE-091 adjuvant; perioperative. ~$13B 2025. Subq Qlex approved Sep-2025 bridges to 2032+ patent estate.

us.reachPct.note: Keytruda dominant 1L NSCLC -- ~22% of all advanced NSCLC pts (post tagrisso/etc filtering); broad indication.

us.wtpPct.note: 80% -- universal Medicare/commercial coverage; PD-L1 testing routine.

eu.reachPct.note: 12% of advanced NSCLC -- EU5 reimbursed 1L by NICE/G-BA; HTA discounts.

row.reachPct.note: 5% -- Japan/AU widely covered; China NRDL listing 2024 expanded volume; LATAM emerging.

row.wtpPct.note: 18% -- Japan NHI full, China NRDL partial.

market.notes: KEYNOTE-006 advanced; KEYNOTE-054/716 adjuvant; KEYTRUDA + LENVIMA + VYJUVEK combos. Also cSCC label. ~$3.5B 2025.

us.reachPct.note: Keytruda ~25% of US advanced melanoma -- KEYNOTE-006 set 1L PD-1 standard; adjuvant capture KEYNOTE-054.

us.wtpPct.note: 80% -- broad coverage; high unmet need pre-IO era.

market.notes: KEYNOTE-859 gastric; KEYNOTE-394/240 HCC; KEYNOTE-177 MSI-H CRC; KEYNOTE-A18 gynecologic. ~$5B 2025 across GI.

us.reachPct.note: Keytruda ~18% of US advanced gastric/HCC/MSI-H -- biomarker-selected (PD-L1, MSI-H).

row.reachPct.note: 4% -- China NRDL gastric volume key; APAC HCC strong.

market.notes: KEYNOTE-426 RCC + Inlyta combo; KEYNOTE-A39 urothelial + Padcev combo. ~$3.5B 2025 across RCC + urothelial.

us.reachPct.note: Keytruda ~18% of US RCC + bladder pools combined.

market.notes: KEYNOTE-048 H&N 1L; KEYNOTE-522 + 355 TNBC neoadjuvant + advanced. ~$3.5B 2025 across H&N + TNBC.

us.reachPct.note: Keytruda ~22% combined US H&N + TNBC; KEYNOTE-048 set H&N 1L standard.

market.notes: KEYNOTE-A18 cervical; KEYNOTE-868 endometrial; classical Hodgkin (KEYNOTE-204); MSI-H tumor-agnostic. ~$3B 2025 across this long tail.

us.reachPct.note: Keytruda ~9% across the gyn+cHL+MSI-H long tail (anchored to ovarian TAM as proxy for gynecologic class).

market.notes: 9-valent HPV vaccine. ~$8.6B 2024 -> $5.2B 2025 (China inventory crash + Japan softness). ACIP recommended 9-26 routine; catch-up to 45. Recovery expected 2026-27. Cervarix (GSK) near-zero share.

us.reachPct.note: Gardasil 9 ~75% of US adolescent HPV vaccination market.

us.wtpPct.note: 75% -- VFC + private commercial cover; ACIP routine.

row.reachPct.note: 12% -- China + LATAM private + government pilots; recovery 2026-27.

market.notes: First-in-class activin signaling pathway agent (TGF-beta superfamily). Subq Q3W. ZENITH stopped early Oct 2025 -- 76% reduction in composite (death/transplant/PAH worsening hospitalization). Label expanded Oct 2025. Acceleron $11.5B acquisition 2021. Peak forecast $5-7B.

us.reachPct.note: Winrevair ~50% reach of 40K US PAH pts (FC II-IV active tx); ZENITH outcomes drive 1L+ adoption.

us.priceK.note: $240K/yr WAC; $244K list per Acceleron pricing PR.

eu.reachPct.note: 30% -- EMA approved; HTA cautious on add-on cost.

market.notes: First-in-class oral HIF-2α inhibitor. RCC 2L+ post-IO + VHL-related tumors + pheochromocytoma/paraganglioma. Adjuvant RCC Ph3 readout 2H 2026.

us.reachPct.note: Welireg ~6% of US RCC pts -- 2L+ post Inlyta+Keytruda, plus VHL + pheo/para small but high-margin.

market.notes: Capvaxive (21v) launch 2024 ramping; Vaxneuvance (15v); Pneumovax 23 legacy. Combined ~$1.7B 2025. Compete with Pfizer Prevnar 20 (~$6.5B). Adult >=50 ACIP routine.

us.reachPct.note: Merck pneumococcal ~30% of US adult vaccinated pool (Pfizer Prevnar 20 dominant ~60%).

market.notes: Clesrovimab approved Jun 2025; first season shipping. ACIP-recommended alternative to nirsevimab (Beyfortus AZ/Sanofi). Single-dose RSV season prophylaxis for infants. Peak ~$1-2B.

us.reachPct.note: Enflonsia ~12% reach of US peds RSV cohort -- nirsevimab Beyfortus dominant first-mover.

us.wtpPct.note: 70% -- VFC + commercial; included in childhood vaccine schedule.

market.notes: First-in-class inhaled PDE3/4 inhibitor. Approved Jun 2024. Verona acquisition closed Oct 7, 2025 ($10B; $107/ADS). Peak forecasts $3-5B. Expanding patient labels to severe asthma (Ph2).

us.reachPct.note: Ohtuvayre ~5% of US severe COPD pool by peak; novel MOA but inhaled requires patient training.

us.wtpPct.note: 60% -- prior auth common; Medicare Part D + commercial.

market.notes: Anti-TL1A monoclonal antibody. Prometheus $10.8B acquisition 2023. Ph2 ARTEMIS-UC positive. Ph3 ATLAS-UC in moderate-to-severe UC (~720 pts), readout 2027. Companion Ph2b in Crohn's. Class peers: RVT-3101 (Roche/Roivant), TEV-48574 (Teva). Peak forecasts $5-8B if first-in-class.

us.reachPct.note: Tulisokibart 2028+ launch if Ph3 hits; 4% peak reach UC competitive vs Stelara/Skyrizi/Entyvio/Rinvoq.

us.wtpPct.note: 50% -- payors require step therapy through TNFi/IL-23/JAKi.

market.notes: Tulisokibart Ph2b in Crohn's; Ph3 to follow. Same biologic class.

us.reachPct.note: Tulisokibart Crohn's later launch if Ph3 hits ~3% peak reach.

assets.name: Ifinatamab deruxtecan (I-DXd) — B7-H3 ADC (Daiichi co-dev)
assets.stage: FDA Priority Review; PDUFA Oct 10, 2026 for ES-SCLC

market.notes: B7-H3-targeting ADC with DXd payload (Daiichi co-developed). IDeate-Lung01 Ph2 ORR 48.2%, mPFS 4.9mo. PDUFA Oct 10, 2026. IDeate-Lung02 Ph3 vs TPC enrolling.

us.reachPct.note: I-DXd 2L+ ES-SCLC capture ~8% of US SCLC pool given high unmet need post-platinum.

us.wtpPct.note: 65% -- ES-SCLC has limited 2L options; payors approve novel ADCs.

assets.name: Raludotatug deruxtecan (R-DXd) — CDH6 ADC (Daiichi co-dev)
assets.stage: Phase 3 REJOICE-Ovarian01 (50.5% Ph2 ORR, FDA Breakthrough)

market.notes: CDH6-targeting ADC with DXd payload. REJOICE-Ovarian01 Ph2 50.5% ORR / 77.6% DCR in platinum-resistant. Ph3 portion enrolling at 5.6 mg/kg. FDA Breakthrough Designation.

us.reachPct.note: R-DXd platinum-resistant ovarian ~6% peak reach if Ph3 confirms; Elahere (mirvetuximab FRa-ADC) is incumbent.

market.notes: Reversible BTK inhibitor (vs covalent ibrutinib/acalabrutinib/zanubrutinib). BELLWAVE-011 (~1,200 pts) head-to-head; primary completion 2032. BELLWAVE-010 R/R venetoclax combo. ONC sonrotoclax + Loxo pirtobrutinib competitive.

us.reachPct.note: Nemtabrutinib 4% peak reach 1L CLL post BELLWAVE-011 readout 2032.

market.notes: Modified gamma-cyclodextrin selectively encapsulates rocuronium/vecuronium NMBs at end-of-surgery. Approved 2015. ~$1.84B 2025 (+4%). US LOE 2026 (post-AAM litigation). Generic erosion expected 2026-27.

us.reachPct.note: Bridion ~25% reach of US NMB-reversal procedures (~4M doses); pre-LOE peak. Generic neostigmine dominates volume.

us.wtpPct.note: 50% -- inpatient hospital pharmacy formulary; cost-conscious institutions prefer neostigmine.

assets.name: Lynparza (olaparib, PARP) — w/ AZ profit-share
assets.stage: Commercial ($1.45B MRK profit-share 2025; AZ books global commercial)

market.notes: PARP inhibitor; ovarian BRCA+/HRD+ 1L maintenance + 2L+ recurrence. AZ books commercial; MRK profit-share ~50%. Largest Lynparza indication.

us.reachPct.note: Lynparza BRCA+/HRD+ ovarian maintenance ~8% reach (BRCA+ ~15-20% of ovarian); MRK profit-share economics.

market.notes: OlympiA adjuvant gBRCA+ HER2- early breast + OlympiAD metastatic gBRCA+. ~25% of Lynparza MRK profit-share.

us.reachPct.note: Lynparza gBRCA+ breast ~4% reach (gBRCA+ ~5-7% of breast).

market.notes: PROpel + PROfound HRR-mutated mCRPC + Lynparza+abiraterone combo. ~20% of Lynparza MRK profit-share.

us.reachPct.note: Lynparza HRR-mutated mCRPC ~3% reach.

market.notes: POLO gBRCA+ pancreatic maintenance. Smallest Lynparza indication (~5% of MRK profit-share). gBRCA+ ~5-7% of pancreatic.

us.reachPct.note: Lynparza gBRCA+ pancreatic ~1% reach (rare biomarker subset).

assets.name: Lenvima (lenvatinib, multi-TKI) — w/ Eisai profit-share
assets.stage: Commercial ($1.05B MRK profit-share 2025; Eisai books global commercial)

market.notes: REFLECT 1L HCC vs sorafenib non-inferior. ~30% of Lenvima profit-share. Atezo-bev (Tecentriq+Avastin) competing 1L.

us.reachPct.note: Lenvima ~10% of US advanced HCC; profit-share blended pricing.

market.notes: CLEAR 1L RCC Lenvima+Keytruda combo + Lenvima monotherapy 2L+. ~30% of Lenvima profit-share.

us.reachPct.note: Lenvima+Keytruda ~5% RCC pool capture (CLEAR-supported 1L).

market.notes: SELECT advanced/refractory differentiated thyroid cancer. ~25% of Lenvima profit-share. Class peers: Cabometyx, sorafenib.

us.reachPct.note: Lenvima ~25% of US advanced DTC pool (~10K eligible).

market.notes: KEYNOTE-775 / Study 309 endometrial 2L+. ~15% of Lenvima profit-share. Tagged to gynecologic.ovarian as proxy area for now.

us.reachPct.note: Lenvima+Keytruda endometrial ~4% reach.

market.notes: Subdermal etonogestrel implant, 3-year contraception. Dominant subdermal LARC option globally. ~3M US users. Approved 2006 (Implanon) / 2011 (Nexplanon next-gen).

us.reachPct.note: Nexplanon ~4% of reproductive-age women US (3M users / 70M); LARC growing.

us.wtpPct.note: 35% -- ACA contraception coverage; Title X; some commercial PA.

row.reachPct.note: 0.4% -- WHO + UNFPA programs in LMICs growing.

market.notes: Dual orexin receptor antagonist (DORA). Approved 2014. ~$300M 2025 (declining). Newer DORAs Quviviq (Idorsia daridorexant) + Dayvigo (Eisai lemborexant) competitive.

us.reachPct.note: Belsomra ~0.6% of US chronic insomnia pool; declining vs newer DORAs + generic zolpidem.

market.notes: Live attenuated pentavalent oral rotavirus vaccine. 3-dose series 2-6mo. ~$700M 2025. Compete with Rotarix (GSK monovalent). WHO EPI growing in LMICs.

us.reachPct.note: RotaTeq ~50% US peds rotavirus vaccination market (Rotarix 50%).

eu.reachPct.note: 25% -- Rotarix dominant in some EU markets.

assets.name: Peds vaccines (ProQuad + M-M-R II + Varivax + Zostavax legacy)

market.notes: M-M-R II (measles/mumps/rubella) + ProQuad (MMRV combo) + Varivax (varicella) + Zostavax (legacy shingles, replaced by GSK Shingrix). ~$1.5B 2025. Mature franchise.

us.reachPct.note: Merck dominant US MMR+varicella vaccines (~80% combined market share).

market.notes: Zerbaxa (ceftolozane-tazobactam ~$200M) + Recarbrio (imipenem-cilastatin-relebactam ~$50M) for cIAI/cUTI/HABP/VABP MDR. Niche specialty (ICU/ID consult).

us.reachPct.note: Zerbaxa+Recarbrio ~12% of US MDR Gram-neg specialty market.

indications.name: CMV prophylaxis post-allo HCT + kidney transplant

market.notes: Terminase inhibitor; CMV prevention in allo HCT (2017) + kidney transplant (2023). ~$500M 2025. Niche specialty. Future expansion: HIV combo, congenital CMV pipeline.

us.reachPct.note: Prevymis ~60% of US allo HCT CMV+ recipients (~21K/yr); kidney transplant expanding.

us.wtpPct.note: 80% -- transplant centers + specialty pharmacy; clear guideline.

indications.name: Animal Health platform (Bravecto Quantum, livestock vaccines, companion diagnostics)

market.notes: Separate biz unit. Livestock +14% Q3 (Bovilis vaccines); companion under parasiticide pressure. Bravecto Quantum yearly injection approved 2025. Class peers: Zoetis ($9B), Elanco ($4B), Boehringer Animal Health.

mega_bear.narrative: Keytruda 2028 cliff hits hard + slow Qlex switch + tulisokibart fails + Gardasil never recovers
events: X Keytruda IV biosimilars Q4 2028 -- erosion 50%+ Y1, faster than expected
X Keytruda Qlex switch <20% (payor pushback on subq pricing premium)
X Tulisokibart ATLAS-UC fails / borderline + Crohn's de-prioritized
X Gardasil China inventory + Japan softness persists; never recovers >$5B
X I-DXd PDUFA delays / label restrictions on SCLC
-> Stock to $75-85 (cash + Winrevair + animal health floor)

bear.narrative: Cliff manageable but harsh + Qlex captures 25% + tulisokibart OK + Winrevair offsets partially
events: ~ Keytruda IV biosimilar erosion -40% Y1 + Qlex captures 25% switch
~ Tulisokibart ATLAS-UC OK; CD slow
V Winrevair $4B+ peak
V I-DXd approved SCLC; modest ramp
X R-DXd Ph3 ovarian missed

base.narrative: Qlex captures 35% of IV before LOE + Winrevair $5B + tulisokibart breakthrough + ADCs offset
events: V Keytruda Qlex captures 35% IV->subq switch by 2028
V Winrevair $5-6B 2030+ on ZENITH expansion
V Tulisokibart ATLAS-UC positive; UC launch 2028
V I-DXd approved SCLC + IDeate-Lung02 Ph3 follows
V R-DXd ovarian Ph3 positive; broader ADC franchise
V Capvaxive ramp + Enflonsia second-season uptake

bull.narrative: Qlex 45%+ + tulisokibart $7B+ in IBD + ADC franchise expands + Winrevair $7B + label expansions
events: V Qlex captures 45%+ IV switch + extends to 2032 patent estate
V Tulisokibart ATLAS-UC strong + Crohn's positive; $7B+ peak in IBD
V I-DXd label expands NSCLC + R-DXd ovarian + new CDH6 indications
V Winrevair indication expansions (HFpEF, label growth) $7B+
V Welireg adjuvant RCC label adds + pheo/para expand
V Net franchise grows through cliff

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Keytruda franchise grows through cliff + IBD megafranchise + multi-tumor ADC platform + animal health + M&A optionality
events: V Qlex + label expansion + lifecycle management = Keytruda flat through 2030
V Tulisokibart $10B+ in UC + CD + 3 add'l IMID indications
V Winrevair $10B PAH + HFpEF + HFrEF expansion
V ADC franchise (I-DXd + R-DXd + future Daiichi assets) > $5B combined
V Animal Health spin-off realizes hidden value
V Acquisition premium / sum-of-parts unlock

lastData.title: FY2025 $65B revenue (+1%); 2026 guide $65.5-67B; Keytruda 2028 LOE looms
points: Subq Keytruda Qlex approved Sep 19, 2025 (Halozyme partnership)
Gardasil $5.2B (-39%) on China inventory crash + Japan softness
Winrevair $1.4B (+233%) post ZENITH outcomes 76% MACE/death/transplant reduction
Verona acquisition closed Oct 7, 2025 ($10B; Ohtuvayre COPD)
I-DXd PDUFA Oct 10, 2026 (ES-SCLC, B7-H3 ADC w/ Daiichi)
Tulisokibart Ph3 ATLAS-UC enrolling (~720 pts, readout 2027)

nextCatalyst.title: I-DXd PDUFA (ES-SCLC) — first ADC approval; Welireg adjuvant RCC Ph3
thresholds: Oct 10, 2026: I-DXd FDA PDUFA (ES-SCLC, B7-H3 ADC)
2026-27: Capvaxive ACIP momentum + Enflonsia second RSV season

risks: Keytruda 2028 LOE: 48% of revenue, IV biosimilars from Samsung Bioepis/Amgen/Celltrion/Indian players. Method patents extend May/Nov 2029.
Subq Keytruda Qlex (~2032 patent estate) is the bridge -- payor acceptance + switching velocity uncertain. Merck guides 30-40% switch by 2028.
Gardasil $8.6B->$5.2B collapse: China inventory destocking + Japan softness; recovery to $7-8B uncertain.
Tulisokibart $10.8B Prometheus acquisition (2023) needs Ph3 ATLAS-UC win to justify; class peers (Roivant RVT-3101, Teva TEV-48574) competing.
Verona $10B for Ohtuvayre (single-asset, COPD competitive vs Trelegy/Breztri/Spiriva).
ADC partnership with Daiichi: I-DXd + R-DXd + patritumab failed (HER3-DXd OS missed). Co-development economics + clinical risk.
Vibostolimab/TIGIT failed (KeyVibe-008 SCLC Sep 2024) -- IO combination strategy questioned.
Pricing pressure: IRA negotiation for Keytruda (Medicare 2027 selection cycle).
Activist / capital allocation scrutiny on Animal Health spin-off potential.

catalysts.title: I-DXd FDA PDUFA — ES-SCLC (B7-H3 ADC)
catalysts._rationale: FDA accepted Priority Review; PDUFA target action Oct 10, 2026.

catalysts.title: Welireg adjuvant RCC Ph3 readout
catalysts._rationale: Adjuvant RCC Ph3 expected H2 2026 per Q4'25 call.

catalysts.title: IDeate-Lung02 Ph3 SCLC readout (vs TPC)
catalysts._rationale: Ph3 confirmatory study following Ph2 ORR 48%; readout 2H26/1H27 per ClinicalTrials.gov enrollment status.

catalysts.title: ATLAS-UC Ph3 tulisokibart topline (UC moderate-severe)
catalysts._rationale: ATLAS-UC primary completion 2027 per ClinicalTrials.gov; ARTEMIS-UC Ph2 positive de-risks.

catalysts.title: REJOICE-Ovarian01 Ph3 portion data
catalysts._rationale: Ph3 enrolling at 5.6 mg/kg post 50.5% Ph2 ORR; data 2027+.

catalysts.title: Keytruda US LOE — composition-of-matter expiry
catalysts._rationale: Composition-of-matter US patent expires Dec 2028; method patents extend May/Nov 2029. Subq Qlex extends to ~2032.
